sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: |【即時新聞】iShares iBonds Dec 2026 Term Muni Bond ETF宣佈每月分配0.0513美元
feed.summary: |iShares iBonds Dec 2026 Term Muni Bond ETF (IBMO) recently announced a monthly distribution of $0.0513. The 30-day SEC yield as of December 17 was 2.49%, with the dividend payable on December 24 to shareholders recorded by December 19 (ex-dividend date also December 19). The ETF's recent market performance shows a stable closing price of $25.6550, with a decreased trading volume, indicating potentially reduced short-term market interest in this municipal bond-focused investment tool.

feed.title: Evergy Stock: Quiet Charts, Growing Tensions Behind The Grid
feed.summary: Evergy's stock valuation remains stable despite underlying concerns from investors regarding interest rates, regulatory scrutiny, and growth expectations. While the stock has seen a marginal one-year decline, its consistent dividend yield helps soften the impact, positioning it as a steady, income-focused investment rather than a high-growth asset. The market awaits new catalysts, such as earnings reports or regulatory decisions, to influence its future trajectory.

feed.title: Labcorp (NYSE:LH) Downgraded by Wall Street Zen to "Hold"
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen recently downgraded Labcorp (NYSE:LH) from a "buy" to a "hold" rating, though overall analyst sentiment remains a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus price target of $299.08. The company slightly exceeded EPS expectations and reported an 8.6% increase in revenue year-over-year, while also issuing FY-2025 EPS guidance. However, insider sales, including by the CEO, have occurred, resulting in insiders owning 0.84% of the stock.

feed.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Wins $739 Million US Space Force Contract
feed.summary: SpaceX has been awarded new contracts totaling $739 million from the U.S. Space Force for several military launches, aimed at enhancing the U.S. military's missile warning and tracking capabilities. These contracts, issued under the National Security Space Launch (NSSL) Phase 3 Lane 1, include missions for the Space Development Agency (SDA) and the National Reconnaissance Office (NRO), with launches projected to begin in late 2026 and throughout 2027-2028. This win further solidifies SpaceX's role in government defense contracts and follows previous significant awards, including a 2024 Pentagon contract to expand Ukraine's access to Starshield.

feed.title: iShares iBonds 2030 Term High Yield and Income ETF (NYSEARCA:IBHJ) Stock Price Up 0% – Here’s What Happened
feed.summary: The iShares iBonds 2030 Term High Yield and Income ETF (IBHJ) saw its share price increase by 0% in mid-day trading on Friday, reaching $26.70 after previously closing at $26.69. Trading volume was up 31% from the daily average, with 46,849 shares changing hands. Lbmc Investment Advisors LLC recently increased its stake in IBHJ by 88.2%, now owning 22.19% of the company's stock, valued at approximately $13.98 million.

feed.title: The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc (NYSE:PNC) Given Average Rating of "Moderate Buy" by Brokerages
feed.summary: The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc (NYSE:PNC) has received an average "Moderate Buy" rating from 22 brokerages, with an average 12-month price target of $222. The company recently exceeded quarterly earnings estimates, reporting $4.35 EPS on $5.92 billion in revenue, and pays an annualized dividend of $6.80, yielding 3.1%. Insider transactions show some selling activity, while institutional investors have adjusted their stakes, resulting in approximately 83.53% institutional ownership.

feed.title: Axon Enterprise Inc.: Can This Public Safety Innovator Keep Outpacing the Market?
feed.summary: Axon Enterprise Inc. has consistently outperformed the market, driven by its cloud software, body cameras, and AI applications in public safety. Despite concerns over its high valuation, Wall Street analysts largely maintain a bullish outlook, with many setting price targets above current trading levels. The company's future success hinges on its ability to further grow software revenue, expand internationally, and manage the ethical implications of AI in public safety.

feed.title: Philip Morris International (NYSE:PM) Cut to Hold at Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Philip Morris International (NYSE:PM) was downgraded from a "buy" to a "hold" rating by Wall Street Zen, though the overall analyst consensus remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $189. The company's stock opened at $162.61, with a market capitalization of $253.13 billion, and recently reported quarterly EPS of $1.59 on $8.12 billion in revenue. Hedge funds have shown varying activity, with some significantly increasing their stakes in the company.

feed.title: Wall Street Zen Upgrades Realty Income (NYSE:O) to Hold
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen upgraded Realty Income (NYSE: O) from "sell" to "hold," aligning with the stock's consensus "Hold" rating and a target price of $62.23. The company surpassed quarterly expectations with $1.08 EPS and $1.47 billion in revenue, setting FY2025 EPS guidance at $4.250–$4.270. Despite a relatively rich valuation with a P/E around 54, institutional investors show significant ownership.

feed.title: FedEx Corp.: How a Legacy Logistics Giant Is Rebuilding the Next?Gen Delivery Machine
feed.summary: FedEx Corp. is transforming itself from a traditional parcel carrier into a data-driven, AI-powered logistics platform, exemplified by its Network 2.0 integration program and expanded digital services. This strategy aims to provide faster, more predictable, and cost-effective delivery while competing fiercely with UPS and Amazon Logistics. The company's competitive edge lies in its global multimodal scale, neutrality as a platform, focus on data and visibility, diversified customer base, and continuous cost optimization efforts.

feed.title: Dollar General Is Quietly Winning America – But Is This Discount King Still Worth Your Money?
feed.summary: This article examines the growing popularity of Dollar General, particularly its traction on social media platforms like TikTok, and evaluates whether the discount retailer is a smart investment. It analyzes Dollar General's market performance, its strategic advantage in rural areas, and its competition with rivals like Dollar Tree. The piece concludes by suggesting that both shoppers and investors need to carefully assess current economic conditions and the company's long-term sustainability as a budget-friendly option before making decisions.

feed.title: Wall Street Zen Upgrades Invesco (NYSE:IVZ) to "Buy"
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen has upgraded Invesco (NYSE:IVZ) from "hold" to "buy," joining other firms with positive outlooks and raised price targets. Despite this, the analyst consensus remains a "Hold" with an average price target of $24.70. Invesco recently exceeded earnings expectations with reported EPS of $0.61 against an expected $0.44, and its shares are trading near a one-year high.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace (NYSE:HWM) Rating Lowered to Hold at Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen has downgraded Howmet Aerospace (NYSE:HWM) from "buy" to "hold," although the consensus among analysts remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $222.82. The company recently surpassed quarterly EPS expectations and reported a 13.8% year-over-year revenue increase, providing strong FY2025 guidance. Several other firms have maintained or even raised their price targets for HWM, reflecting continued confidence in the stock despite this latest downgrade.

feed.title: Huntington Ingalls Industries (NYSE:HII) Downgraded by Wall Street Zen to "Buy"
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen downgraded Huntington Ingalls Industries (NYSE:HII) from "strong-buy" to "buy." Despite this, the company reported strong third-quarter earnings, beating analyst expectations with $3.68 EPS and $3.19 billion in revenue, up 16.1% year-over-year. Insider selling has occurred, yet institutional investors hold a significant portion of shares.

feed.title: Wall Street Zen Upgrades Hawthorn Bancshares (NASDAQ:HWBK) to "Buy"
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen has upgraded Hawthorn Bancshares (NASDAQ:HWBK) from a "hold" to a "buy" rating, although Weiss Ratings reiterated a "hold," maintaining the stock's consensus "Hold" rating. The company's stock is trading around $31.90 with a market cap of $220.1 million and strong financial indicators like a P/E of 10.0, 20.09% net margin, and 14.22% ROE. Institutional investors hold approximately 30.7% of the company, with several major firms increasing their positions in the last quarter.

feed.title: 3M Company’s Quiet Reinvention: How a 122-Year-Old Materials Giant Is Rebuilding Its Innovation Ma
feed.summary: 3M Company is undergoing a significant transformation, shifting from a broad industrial conglomerate to a specialized material-science platform. The company is focusing on advanced filtration, electrification, and healthcare technology to drive growth. This strategic pivot aims to leverage 3M's deep expertise in material science to cater to critical demands across various high-growth sectors, positioning it as a key supplier for modern industrial needs.

feed.title: Amazon Proposes First Big-Box Retail Store In Orland Park
feed.summary: Amazon plans to open a large-format retail store in Orland Park, Illinois, a 229,000-square-foot facility larger than a Walmart Supercenter, marking a significant expansion of its physical retail footprint. The development on a 35-acre site at 159th Street and LaGrange Road was approved by the Orland Park Plan Commission and awaits a final vote from the village board on January 19. If approved, the store is expected to generate sales tax revenue for the area, supporting municipal services and improvements.

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) Is Up 10.2% After Dividend Cut And LIC Impairment - Has The Bull Case Changed?
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) recently reported weaker Q3 2025 results, including a significant real estate impairment and a 45% dividend cut. These issues, alongside multiple class action lawsuits regarding its Long Island City asset, highlight challenges in occupancy and life science leasing. The company's future hinges on its ability to recover from these financial and legal pressures, making investor focus on balance sheet flexibility and leasing traction critical.

feed.title: Is Chubb (CB) Pricing Reflect Its Strong Excess Returns And P/E Rating Today
feed.summary: This article analyzes Chubb's (CB) valuation using Excess Returns and P/E ratio models. It concludes that Chubb's shares appear undervalued by 53.5% based on excess returns and also undervalued on a P/E basis, trading at 12.48x compared to its Simply Wall St Fair Ratio of 14.35x. The article further explores Bull and Bear case narratives to provide a comprehensive view of the company's potential future value.

feed.title: Gladstone Investment Corporation Prices Offering of 6.875% Notes due 2028
feed.summary: Gladstone Investment Corporation announced the pricing of a registered direct offering of $60.0 million aggregate principal amount of 6.875% Notes due 2028. The Notes will mature on November 1, 2028, and interest will be payable semi-annually. The company intends to use the net proceeds to repay revolving credit facility debt, fund new investments, and for general corporate purposes.

feed.title: An Oil Exec on ‘Landman,’ Venezuela, and Beating the S&P 500
feed.summary: Mark Lashier, CEO of Phillips 66, discussed various topics including the energy company’s new directors, its relationship with activist investor Elliott Management, and the origins of the company's name. The interview, recorded in December 2025, also touched on broader industry issues like Venezuela and outperforming the S&P 500.

feed.title: Embedding PayPal Direct Deposit in Flex Perks Could Be A Game Changer For Paychex (PAYX)
feed.summary: Paychex (PAYX) recently partnered with PayPal to integrate PayPal Direct Deposit into its Flex Perks marketplace, offering employees early access to pay and PayPal's financial tools. This move aims to expand Paychex's suite of technology-enabled Human Capital Management (HCM) solutions and cater to unbanked workers, reinforcing its product breadth. While strengthening Paychex's technological offerings, investors should consider ongoing macro uncertainties surrounding small and mid-sized business hiring.

feed.title: Nvidia Corp. (NVDA) Mizuho Securities Raises Target on Sustained AI Demand
feed.summary: Mizuho Securities has increased its 12-month target price for Nvidia (NVDA) to $275 from $245, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating. This upgrade reflects strong and enduring demand for Nvidia’s data-center products, driven by the rapid adoption of generative AI and large language models. The firm expects sustained revenue and margin expansion due to Nvidia's robust product roadmap and expanding total addressable market in the AI sector.

feed.title: Fulcrum Therapeutics Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
feed.summary: Fulcrum Therapeutics, Inc. announced it granted non-statutory stock options to three new employees under its 2022 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan. This comes as an inducement for their employment, in accordance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). The options allow the purchase of 30,400 shares at an exercise price of $10.84 per share, vesting over four years.

feed.title: 【即時新聞】iShares ESG Aware Moderate Allocation ETF 宣布季度股息，投資人需注意
feed.summary: iShares ESG Aware Moderate Allocation ETF (EAOM) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.2846 per share, payable on December 29th, with a record date and ex-dividend date of December 23rd. Investors need to hold the ETF by December 23rd to receive this dividend, which provides a steady income stream, especially during market volatility. Despite a recent 0.22% rise to $30.3250, the ETF's trading volume decreased significantly by 93.04% to 604 shares on the previous day.

feed.title: XTI Aerospace Announces New Employment Agreement with Chief Strategy Officer
feed.summary: XTI Aerospace, Inc. (XTIA) announced a new employment agreement with Tobin Arthur, its Chief Strategy Officer, effective January 5, 2026. This agreement supersedes a previous one and includes a stock option award for Mr. Arthur. The original SEC filing for this information is an 8-K dated January 9, 2026.

feed.title: Nova Minerals: Solid Capital Injection And Possible Mineral Production In 2026(NASDAQ:NVA)
feed.summary: Nova Minerals (NVA) is rated a "hold" due to its strong liquidity and fully funded antimony project, targeting production in 2026. While the stock appears overvalued with a forward P/B of 3.89x, projected Net Asset Value (NAV) growth could increase its value in 2026. Key risks include potential delays in antimony production, unproven gold reserves, and the need for significant future funding for gold projects, which could lead to share dilution.

feed.title: Trump calls for one-year cap on credit card interest rates at 10%
feed.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump has called for a one-year cap on credit card interest rates at 10%, effective January 20, 2026, a pledge he made during his 2024 election campaign. While lawmakers from both parties have raised concerns about high credit card rates, analysts and critics, including Senator Elizabeth Warren, note that such a cap would require congressional approval to be enforceable. Banking advocacy groups have also warned that a 10% cap could reduce credit availability and push consumers towards less regulated alternatives.

feed.title: Helios Technologies (HLIO) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
feed.summary: Helios Technologies (HLIO) surpassed its Q1 earnings and revenue estimates, reporting $0.44 per share against an expected $0.36, and revenues of $195.5 million, exceeding the $188.4 million consensus. Despite this, the company's shares have declined by 37.9% year-to-date, and its earnings outlook revisions are currently unfavorable, leading to a Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell). The article also touches upon another industry peer, Broadwind Energy, Inc. (BWEN), and its upcoming Q1 report.

feed.title: Frontline plc (NYSE: FRO) details fleet renewal, adding nine vessels and selling eight
feed.summary: Frontline plc announced a strategic fleet renewal initiative to modernize its vessel portfolio. The company plans to acquire nine new vessels while selling eight older ones, aiming for potential efficiency gains and updated fleet mix. This move is detailed in an SEC Form 6-K filing, with more specifics expected in a linked press release.

feed.title: Sprott Eric buys Hycroft Mining (HYMC) shares worth $3.28 million
feed.summary: Eric Sprott, a ten percent owner of Hycroft Mining Holding Corp (NASDAQ:HYMC), and 2176423 Ontario Ltd, have purchased shares totaling $3.28 million in two transactions. This insider buying comes after HYMC stock saw a 1,211% return over the past year. The company has also recently eliminated all its debt and reported its highest silver grades to date at its Nevada mine.

feed.title: Evaluating Fiverr International (FVRR) After Recent Stock Drop And Growing Undervaluation Debate
feed.summary: Fiverr International (FVRR) experienced a 7.05% stock drop, contributing to a 7.83% year-to-date decline and a 42.96% one-year loss, despite expectations for improved EPS and revenue. Analysts find the stock undervalued, with a fair value of US$43.33 compared to its current US$18.14, driven by anticipated revenue growth from high-margin services and operational efficiencies, though weak SMB sentiment poses a risk. Investors are encouraged to assess the full narrative and consider other high-growth tech and AI stocks.

feed.title: Immix Biopharma — NXC-201’s path to BLA submission
feed.summary: Immix Biopharma's lead CAR-T candidate, NXC-201, shows promise in treating relapsed/refractory amyloid light chain amyloidosis (r/r ALA) based on positive clinical updates from the NEXICART-2 trial. The company anticipates a final readout in mid-2026 and plans to submit a biologics license application (BLA) to the FDA by the end of 2026, provided results remain supportive. Alongside these developments, a $100 million fund-raise is expected to finance operations until mid-2027, leading Edison Investment Research to increase Immix's valuation to $373.2 million, or $7.2 per share.

feed.title: Equinor (EQNR) Faces $5.3 Billion Risk with Empire Wind Project Delay
feed.summary: Equinor's Empire Wind project, located off New York's coast and over 60% complete, faces potential termination by January 16 if construction delays persist, leading to a risk of $5.3 billion loss. This situation is due to a Trump administration directive prohibiting essential safety-related activities and challenges with specialized vessel availability. Despite this significant risk, Equinor's strong financial health, diversified operations, and solid balance sheet provide some buffer against sector-specific challenges, though its valuation presents a mixed picture with a P/E ratio near a three-year high and P/S and P/B ratios near multi-year lows.

feed.title: Chart Industries Names Gerry Vinci as New President
feed.summary: Chart Industries has appointed Gerry Vinci, their Chief Human Resources Officer, as the new President of the company, effective January 6, 2026. This appointment signifies a focus on leadership continuity given that Vinci's employment terms remain largely unchanged and an interim CEO will not be named. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates GTLS as Neutral, noting strong revenue growth balanced by high valuation and legal challenges.

feed.title: Assessing Futu Holdings (FUTU) Valuation After Strong Earnings And Rising Investor Optimism
feed.summary: Futu Holdings (FUTU) surged by 9.01% after strong quarterly earnings, benefiting from increased client asset inflows and high customer retention. Despite its high leverage, the company is seen as 20.9% undervalued by Simply Wall St, with a narrative fair value of US$227.56 against its current trading price of US$180.08. Investors are encouraged to assess the underlying assumptions and potential risks, such as regulatory changes or cooling market activity, while considering the company's strong momentum and growth prospects.

feed.title: After Winning Michigan ADW Court Case, Could CDI/TwinSpires Turn Their Attention To Texas?
feed.summary: Churchill Downs Inc.'s TwinSpires recently secured a significant legal victory in Michigan, where federal courts ruled that the Interstate Horseracing Act, not state law, governs interstate simulcasting. This decision challenges state-level attempts to regulate advance deposit wagering (ADW) based on where the bettor resides. The ruling could embolden TwinSpires and other ADW companies to pursue legal challenges in states like Texas, potentially overturning existing state prohibitions on telephone or internet wagering.

feed.title: Is Analyst Focus On Dish Contracts And Contractual Revenue Altering The Investment Case For American Tower (AMT)?
feed.summary: A recent analyst upgrade for American Tower (AMT) highlighted its long-term tower lease contracts with Dish, running through 2036 and generating about US$200 million annually. This reassessment suggests that the market might be underestimating American Tower's contractual revenue visibility, shifting the perception of Dish from a pure risk to a component of long-term contracted revenue. While the upgrade points to stable growth, investors are encouraged to consider diverse fair value estimates and American Tower's overall financial health.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC, guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co., is offering Auto Callable Contingent Interest Notes linked to the iShares Silver Trust (SLV) and the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY). These notes provide contingent interest payments if both Funds perform above a certain threshold, with potential automatic calls and risk of principal loss if performance is poor. Investors should be aware of the credit risks of JPMorgan Financial and JPMorgan Chase & Co., and the notes' estimated value will be lower than the original issue price due to various costs.

feed.title: Textron Inc.: How a Quiet Industrial Powerhouse Is Rewiring the Future of Mobility and Defense
feed.summary: Textron Inc. is transforming from a traditional industrial conglomerate into a high-tech mobility and defense platform, focusing on business jets, military rotorcraft, eVTOL air taxis, and autonomous ground systems. The company's strategy involves building a flexible technology ecosystem that integrates manufacturing, certification, and defense-grade reliability with next-generation platforms across its various brands like Cessna, Beechcraft, Bell, and Textron Systems. This strategic shift positions Textron Inc. as a diversified aerospace and defense growth story, offering a coherent and flexible portfolio that dampens volatility for both customers and investors.

feed.title: VICI Properties Inc: Dividend Fortress Or Range-Bound REIT? A Deep Look At The Market’s Split Verd
feed.summary: The article discusses VICI Properties Inc (VICI), highlighting its strong dividend and resilient performance in the REIT sector, particularly within gaming and experiential real estate. While income investors view it as a stable asset, the market is currently split, with some seeing a range-bound stock in a higher-rate environment. Analysts are largely bullish, anticipating modest upside alongside its robust dividend payments, making it a compelling option for income-oriented portfolios.

feed.title: Mylan, Aurobindo Must Face Generic Drug Price-Fixing Claims
feed.summary: A Connecticut federal judge has denied requests from Mylan Pharmaceuticals and Aurobindo Pharma USA for a quick win in an antitrust lawsuit. The ruling means the companies must face claims from a coalition of states that they conspired to fix generic drug prices. This decision allows the sprawling litigation, involving 26 pharmaceutical companies, to proceed.

feed.title: Why Hancock Whitney (HWC) is Poised to Beat Earnings Estimates Again
feed.summary: Hancock Whitney (HWC) is expected to beat its upcoming earnings estimates, extending its previous streak of positive surprises. The company has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP of +0.99% and a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), indicating a strong likelihood of another beat. This prediction is based on analysts revising their estimates higher just before the earnings release, which is scheduled for January 20, 2026.

feed.title: Trump calls for one year cap on credit card interest rates at 10%
feed.summary: President Donald Trump announced a call for a one-year cap on credit card interest rates at 10% starting January 20, 2026, a pledge he also made during his 2024 election campaign. While he provided no details on implementation, saying the American public would no longer be "ripped off," analysts and some politicians have previously noted that such a cap would require congressional approval. The White House affirmed the cap on social media, while major banks and credit card issuers did not immediately comment.

feed.title: The Truth About DaVita Inc.: Why Wall Street Is Watching While TikTok Sleeps On It
feed.summary: This article discusses DaVita Inc. (DVA), a major dialysis provider, highlighting its stable business model based on recurring patient needs, which attracts serious investors despite its lack of social media buzz. It contrasts DaVita's solid fundamentals and essential healthcare services with its minimal presence on platforms like TikTok, where viral trends typically dominate. The piece advises potential investors to consider DaVita for long-term portfolio stability rather than quick gains, emphasizing the importance of understanding the company's regulatory risks and healthcare focus.

feed.title: Expedia Group stock: Can a battered online travel giant turn its volatile rebound into a lasting ral
feed.summary: Shares of Expedia Group Inc. have seen a volatile period, with a recent slip after a sharp winter rally, as investors weigh cooling travel momentum against largely positive analyst ratings. The company is investing in AI and personalization and streamlining operations to drive profitable growth amidst intense competition. Analysts generally rate EXPE as 'Buy' or 'Hold', expecting further, albeit less explosive, gains.

feed.title: C.H. Robinson Worldwide: Can a Legacy Logistics Giant Become a Digital Freight Platform Powerhouse?
feed.summary: C.H. Robinson Worldwide is transforming itself from a traditional 3PL into a digital logistics platform, focusing on data-driven solutions such as its Navisphere platform, digital freight matching, and advanced analytics. The company aims to provide more efficient and transparent logistics by integrating technology with its extensive physical network to address the complex needs of shippers and carriers. This strategic shift is crucial for its stock valuation, as the market assesses whether it can achieve higher returns through automation and customer stickiness despite competition from digital-first rivals like Uber Freight and Flexport.

feed.title: Why Freeport-McMoRan Stock Possesses Significant Upside Potential in 2026?
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) stock is seen as an attractive buying opportunity despite a recent dip, as copper prices near historical highs. The company is expected to see substantial earnings improvement in 2026 and 2027 as it recovers from a mine accident in Indonesia. Analysts highlight that rising metal prices will offset production losses, and the stock's current valuation is highly attractive, suggesting significant upside potential.

feed.title: Gladstone Investment Announces Intent to Redeem All Outstanding 8.00% Notes due 2028
feed.summary: Gladstone Investment Corporation announced its intent to redeem all outstanding 8.00% Notes due 2028. The redemption date is December 16, 2025, with a redemption price equal to 100% of the aggregate principal amount plus accrued and unpaid interest. Following the redemption, the 2028 Notes will be delisted from the Nasdaq Global Select Market.

feed.title: Foghorn Therapeutics Inc. Secures $50 Million in Equity Financing to Advance Oncology Pipeline and Strengthen Balance Sheet
feed.summary: Foghorn Therapeutics has successfully secured $50 million in equity financing from investors like BVF Partners and Deerfield Management, enhancing its financial runway into the first half of 2028 with an estimated $208.9 million in cash. This funding will support the advancement of its oncology pipeline, specifically the Phase 1 trial for FHD-909 targeting SMARCA4-mutant cancers and the development of selective CBP and EP300 degrader programs expected to be IND-ready in 2026. The company remains focused on developing new treatment options for cancers with significant unmet needs, reinforcing investor confidence through this premium-priced financing.
